ksa_text: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, accountability structures across organizational boundaries, and facilitating cross-domain solutions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the task contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('build and lead cross.functional'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is strong (0.4710, top tier for this dataset); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
